footer.title:
Building a Conscious
& Responsible Future.
footer.desc: Association Maroc de l'Avenir (AMA) is dedicated to youth empowerment and regional development in Khouribga.
footer.rights: Association Maroc de l'Avenir (AMA). All rights reserved.

home.heroDesc: Association Maroc de l'Avenir (AMA) is a civil, voluntary, and independent organization in Khouribga dedicated to fostering a conscious and responsible youth through educational, cultural, and civic empowerment.
home.bento_stat1_desc: Active members committed to community development
home.bento_stat2_desc: Youth participation across all our programs and initiatives
home.bento_regional_desc: Scope of intervention covering the Beni Mellal-Khenifra region
home.hiw_desc: AMA is a civil, voluntary, and independent organization that focuses on the civil development of youth and emerging generations through comprehensive training and humanitarian services.
home.hiw_step1_desc: We provide remedial classes for students and support youth who have dropped out of school to reintegrate into public life.
home.hiw_step2_desc: Training programs in digital technologies, media, and communication to equip youth with modern professional skills.
home.hiw_step3_desc: Organizing seminars, exhibitions, and artistic workshops to foster creativity and preserve our national heritage.
home.hiw_step4_desc: Institutional advocacy for local and regional issues, promoting human rights and participatory democracy.
home.process_title: Building A Brighter Future For Moroccan Youth
home.process_step1_desc: To foster a conscious and responsible youth who understand their rights and duties within a mature, modern society, contributing to a modern, democratic, and developing Morocco.
home.process_step2_desc: To contribute to the civil development of youth through educational, cultural, artistic, scientific, social, humanitarian, and sports training, promoting noble human values.
home.process_step3_desc: We aim to create spaces for dialogue, support educational success, promote human rights, and build partnerships for sustainable development at local and international levels.
home.wavy_banner_text: AMA strikes the perfect balance between youth empowerment and community leadership.

auth.login_desc: Access your private dashboard and member resources.
auth.signup_desc: Join our community and start your journey with us.
auth.visual_title: Empowering the next generation of leaders in Khouribga.
auth.visual_desc: Join our community of changemakers and generate lasting impact.
